findings.finding: The signed gap calculation cleanly tests the objective, but the task requires the learner to output a percentage point text description which could be simplified by separating the calculation field from the interpretation sentence.
findings.resolution: Consider separating the numerical gap entry from the text interpretation into a multi-part item in future versions. No change required for approval.

limitations: No access to prior authoring discussion or learner data; review relies entirely on the frozen candidate artifacts.
